# Thumbnail Maker

A browser-based tool that generates thumbnail images from text. No server required — all rendering happens in-browser via Canvas API.

## How to use via URL

Open `index.html` with query parameters to pre-fill inputs and trigger rendering automatically.

### Query Parameters

| Parameter   | Description                              | Default   | Values / Range         |
|-------------|------------------------------------------|-----------|------------------------|
| title       | Main title text (\n for line breaks)     | —         | any string             |
| subtitle    | Subtitle text                            | —         | any string             |
| author      | Author name (displayed bottom-right)     | —         | any string             |
| theme       | Color theme                              | classic   | classic, dark, blue    |
| size        | Canvas output size                       | note      | note, youtube, ogp, wide, square, twitter |
| titleSize   | Title font size (px)                     | 96        | 24–120                 |
| subSize     | Subtitle font size (px)                  | 48        | 12–72                  |
| authorSize  | Author font size (px)                    | 24        | 10–48                  |

### Canvas Sizes

| ID       | Dimensions   | Use case              |
|----------|--------------|-----------------------|
| note     | 1280 × 670   | note.com article cover |
| youtube  | 1280 × 720   | YouTube thumbnail      |
| ogp      | 1200 × 630   | OGP / SNS card         |
| wide     | 1280 × 512   | 5:2 wide banner        |
| square   | 1080 × 1080  | Instagram square       |
| twitter  | 1500 × 500   | Twitter header         |

### Example URLs

```
index.html?title=AIが変える未来&subtitle=2025年の技術トレンド&author=山田花子&theme=dark&size=note
index.html?title=Weekly%20Report&author=Taro&theme=blue&size=ogp&titleSize=80
```

## Download

After opening the URL, click the **PNG / JPG / WebP / SVG** buttons on the page to download the rendered thumbnail.

There is no programmatic download API — user interaction is required to trigger the file save.

## Themes

| ID      | Background | Text style             |
|---------|------------|------------------------|
| classic | White      | Dark text, blue accent |
| dark    | Near-black | White text, blue accent |
| blue    | Deep blue  | White text             |
